HGSS.634.0001:
Oh hey, [0101,0000,0000]!
Talking on the phone’s a bit odd.\r
Just talk to me!
HGSS.634.0003:
Hey, I turned all the Apricorns you
gave me into Poké Balls.\f
Come pick up the [0133,000B,0000] [0108,000A,0000](s)
whenever you’ve got time!
HGSS.634.0004:
You just asked me to make ’em!
Ya gotta give me a day at least!
HGSS.634.0005:
If you bring me some Apricorns, I can
make you some Poké Balls.\r
Come over whenever you’ve got time!
HGSS.634.0006:
Oh, hey! My old man had something he
wanted to ask you about!\r
I’ll put him on the line. Just a sec!\f
